_doc: Quarantine manifest for known-flaky tests. See scripts/ci/check-quarantine.mjs for the validation rules. Each entry MUST have an issue link and an `expires` date within 30 days of `added`. Manifest is empty by default; never add an entry without first opening a tracking issue.

vitest.reason: Intermittent cold-start/network jitter against the deployed support-chat function under parallel security-suite load. Tests pass locally and a live curl confirms the function correctly returns 403 for this origin; the origin gate runs before rate limiting, so the only plausible cause is transient edge infra latency exceeding the 30s per-test timeout.
